query:
INSERT INTO lm_repertorios (tipoRepertorioId, titulo, slug, tempoLiturgico, categoria, descricao, visivel, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  1 as tipoRepertorioId,
  nome as titulo,
  LOWER(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(nome, ' ', '-'), 'á', 'a'), 'é', 'e')) as slug,
  'TEMPO_COMUM' as tempoLiturgico,
  'Repertório' as categoria,
  descricao,
  1 as visivel,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
FROM repertorios
WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT repertorioId FROM lm_repertorios WHERE repertorioId IS NOT NULL)
LIMIT 100;
